description: You are a Robotics Engineer designing a parametric stepper motor mount for NEMA 17 motors (42.3mm x 42.3mm body, 4 x M3 holes in a 31mm x 31mm square, 22mm diameter shaft collar boss) to be used at the elbow and shoulder joints of a 6-DOF robot arm. The mount must attach to standard V-slot 2020 aluminum extrusion (20mm slot pitch). Create a fully parametric FreeCAD model where all critical dimensions—including motor hole pattern, bore diameter, base thickness, and frame hole spacing—are defined as named parameters in a Spreadsheet. The mount must provide both motor-side attachment geometry and robot-frame-side attachment holes. Log in as ga / password123. Save the model to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/motor_mount.FCStd and export the solid body as STL to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/motor_mount.stl.
